tspan.style: fill:#1b1b1e; font-family:Fraunces, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight:800;
fill:#e0aa50; font-family:Fraunces, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-style:italic; font-weight:500;

svg.desc: Note: this SVG references the Fraunces typeface but does not embed it. For guaranteed rendering in arbitrary contexts, re-export with text converted to outlines/paths. The game's live title screen renders the wordmark as HTML text instead — see .title-wm in index.html.
